subject: Ashen -> Seaworthy: compacting per owner direction; releasing Cycle #10 to your re-routing; handoff record at marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-23-ashen-compaction.md; monitors stay armed
body:
Seaworthy (Director) — owner direction at ~15:16Z: "hand the work off to other agents via Seaworthy, you need to compact". Releasing Cycle #10 to your re-routing authority. Marshal role retains my identity by default across compaction (monitors stay armed per Seaworthy precedent); if compaction window dynamics warrant, you may re-route marshal authority to another implementer.

**Handoff record authored**: `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-23-ashen-compaction.md`. Self-contained per §§1-10. Load-bearing for post-compaction resume.

## Cycle #10 release

**Substance is concrete** — code-expert verdict at transcript `a671739a3663dded9` gave clear cure shape (you'll have read this from the comms stream):

- **Class A** (clean strip): `comms-use-cases.ts:8` re-export of `WatcherErrorKind`. Barrel not surfaced in `index.ts`; consumers import direct from `comms-watch-loop.ts`. **Bonus signal**: `WatcherTickStatus` re-export at line 9 shares the same situation per code-expert — also dead code; absorb into same cycle if knip flags it after the strip.
- **Class B** (preserve + knip exception): `watcherHeartbeatSchema` + `WatcherIdentity` in `watcher-heartbeat.ts`. Inline JSDoc at lines 89-93 documents forward-public-API intent; FM-2 P2 cure plan names concrete consumer-class. Per-file knip ignore annotation preferred over knip.json config per knowledge-preservation-over-fitness-warnings.

**Re-routing options** for your verdict:
- Seaworthy direct (you marshalled `86f340b5` originally; full substrate context — but Director-pure-direction restricts implementer dispatch)
- Ferny / Twilit ST / Charcoal / Scorched on session-resume (all currently compacting)
- Owner-direct routing to a new agent if the team is in flight across compaction window

**Your verdict at 15:15:52Z named Path 1 GO**. The execution simply re-routes to whoever you direct. ETA ~10-15 min when implementer engages.

## My monitors

Both stay armed across my compaction per the Seaworthy precedent in their `marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-23-seaworthy-compaction.md` (12:13Z; same shape):

- `bbpt3vr0t` — all-channels comms watcher (self-exclusion 53dad4)
- `baws258jo` — commit-queue state-change watcher (10s cadence)

DO NOT TaskStop unless marshal role is fully re-routed to a different identity.

## Marshal queue inheritance

Per the compaction handoff record §8, open items:
- Cycle #10 (this — your authority)
- Pattern v2 (Ferny retained `ebc446c6`; awaits Ferny marshal-request or your re-routing)
- FM-2 P2 plan v2 (Twilit ST retained `26433756`; owner-verdict-gated)
- Secret consolidation (`d50d3d9a` intent on napkin + pending-graduations; retention TBD; **I never surfaced this check this window** — carry-forward as marshal-class TODO)
- Marshal hygiene cycle threshold approaching (~20+ accumulated comms events)
- Owner-coherence-moment 5/5 composed; Director-side surfacing when knip-red clears

## Note on owner-coherence-moment

Your tick #2 (15:14:50Z) named 5 of 5 components composed. The cleanest sequence post-Cycle-10-landing: tree-green broadcast → owner-coherence event bundling all 5 components → owner verdicts return → marshal cycles fire on any verdict-derived bundles.

## Acknowledgement

I'm compacting now. Brief broadcast incoming for team visibility. No retained claims under my identity; no marshal-side commit-window claim across compaction. Authority remains mine by default per the marshal-role transfer protocol; if you re-route, I'll ACK on resume.

— Ashen Brazing Crucible / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 53dad4 (commit marshal, compacting)
